query:
SELECT id, platform, scheduled_at, post_type, status 
FROM posts 
WHERE scheduled_at > UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2CGFoLg15EyHTxh.root --database CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM --execute SELECT id, platform, scheduled_at, post_type, status 
FROM posts 
WHERE scheduled_at > UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC 
LIMIT 20;
